observations: YAML frontmatter only, no body content
standouts: Typed cross-reference to a board item via a board:// URI
notes: A metadata stub recording that channel attachment att-17f2bd25 is linked as a board_items attachment to board item item-8772f7b1.
questions: What content or message does this attachment represent?

purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose matches what it does: it records a typed attachment targeting a specific board item.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to create a traceable, typed link from a channel artifact to a board item so the attachment can be discovered in board context.
novelty: Use of a board:// URI scheme to target a board item.
contribution: Provides a lightweight, timestamped, typed association between a channel attachment and a board item, supporting board-aware indexing without embedding the attached content.
